Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-04 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis - Momentum Ranker Long AGX stands out dramatically as the top-ranked momentum play with a score of 96.2, demonstrating exceptional long-term strength across all timeframes: 1,989% over 10 years, 1,310% over 5 years, and 339% over 1 year, while consistently beating SPY by 1,745% and 1,238% respectively over those periods. The ticker shows clean momentum signals with all four moving average crossovers intact (SMA 30/50/100/200), though its thin volatility profile (0.729 vol_ratio) suggests lower trading volume relative to price moves. In contrast, MUSA displays a concerning structural weakness: while it achieved strong historical returns (892% over 10 years), it has severely underperformed SPY in the recent 1-year period (negative 9.65%), indicating that its decade-long gains came from an earlier era and current momentum has deteriorated. AGX's 4 out of 4 ratio passes versus MUSA's mixed ratio progression (particularly the 0.3 ratio from 6-month to 1-year returns) suggests AGX maintains consistent acceleration while MUSA has stalled.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
